entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: Region in Africa where agriculture faces challenges due to climate change

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental change causing uncertainty in crop production and yield declines

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION MODELS
entities.description: Tools used to provide information on agricultural yields under climate change scenarios

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area, affected by climate change and adaptation strategies

entities.name: ADAPTATION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Agricultural practices used to mitigate the negative effects of climate change on crop yields

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC REVIEW
entities.description: Research method used to analyze the impact of climate change on staple crops in West Africa

entities.name: STAPLE CROPS
entities.description: Major crops that form the basis of the diet in West Africa

entities.name: OPTIMISED PLANTING DATES
entities.description: An adaptation strategy involving the adjustment of planting times to offset climate change effects

entities.name: FERTILISER USE
entities.description: An adaptation strategy involving the application of fertilizers to increase yields

entities.name: CLIMATE-RESILIENT CROP VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop varieties developed to withstand the effects of climate change
